install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends wget git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install scipy scikit-learn seaborn tqdm ogb

cd /workspace/ChebNetII && python -c "from torch_geometric.datasets import Planetoid; Planetoid(root='./main/data', name='Cora'); Planetoid(root='./main/data', name='Citeseer'); print('Planetoid datasets downloaded')"
cd /workspace/ChebNetII && python -c "import torch; from torch_geometric.nn import GCNConv; print('PyG ready');"
